# Overview

This section describes specific recommendations that offer expert opinions and actionable prescriptions in the context of the 📐 **Architecture** space. Each article discusses various trade-offs and considerations to help you make informed decisions tailored to your unique context.

Articles in this section include:

*   Scaling Git repositories
